gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, students are clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; also, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
